note: GRX-011 measured ssao_blur real-pass enablement telemetry: with the default-false dispatch_real_pass opt-in explicitly enabled, the tracked Godot SSAO blur call site invoked the Rurix bridge through the patch 0015 native resource handle binding; every fallback entry records the fail-closed gate outcome (validation_failed when the linked real dispatch cannot complete; unsupported_device under the forced capability downgrade) while the native Godot SSAO blur rendered every frame.
